About: It is about the official ideology of North Korea and its ruling Workers Party of Korea.
It is about the philosophical principle of Kimilsungism-Kimjongilism.
Affects: It affects the nation state, national sovereignty.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Marxism–Leninism.
It is associated with Kim Il Sung.
It is associated with Kim Jong Il.
It is associated with the Ten Principles for the Establishment of a Monolithic Ideological System.
It is associated with the Sino-Japanese word 主體.
It is associated with German philosophy.
It is associated with Karl Marx's writings.
It is associated with the Down-with-Imperialism Union.
It is associated with Korea's liberation struggle against Japan.
It is associated with Hwang Jang-yop.
It is associated with the Yan'an Rectification Movement in China.
It is associated with the Workers' Party of Korea.
It is associated with Andrei Lankov.
It is associated with socialist states.
It is associated with the Supreme People's Assembly.
It is associated with the Korean revolution.
BelongsTo: It belongs to the Workers Party of Korea.
ConsistsOf: It consists of historical materialist ideas of Marxism–Leninism.
It consists of emphasis on human agency.
It consists of emphasis on the role of consciousness.
It consists of emphasis on the primacy of ideology and propaganda.
CreatedBy: It was created by Kim Il Sung.
CreatedFor: It was created for North Korea.
CreatedTo: It was created to establish a self-reliant state.
It was created to consolidate political independence.
It was created to build up the foundations of an independent national economy.
It was created to increase the country's defence capabilities.
It was created to safeguard the security of the fatherland.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Kim Jong Il.
It was developed by Hwang Jang-yop.
DevelopedIn: It was developed in the 1980s and 1990s.
HasA: It has a connotation of 'self-reliance'.
It has a connotation of 'autonomy'.
It has a connotation of 'independence'.
It has a philosophical principle.
It has a political purge.
It has a cult of personality.
It has a guiding idea.
It has a new phase of revolutionary theory.
It has a new era in the development of human history.
It has a decree on the adoption of the Juche calendar.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by people being the masters of everything.
